themes: Manager-heavy backlog with long wait times: The overwhelming majority of contacts are Managers, many waiting well over 100 days, signaling a systemic gap in proactive Product engagement with this mid-tier user segment that manages the most hands-on, day-to-day platform workflows.

Multi-contact accounts signal unresolved needs: Several accounts — including Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Ford, Orangetheory Fitness, and others — appear multiple times across the backlog, suggesting that initial outreach or product responses have not fully resolved underlying questions or pain points for these organizations.

Industry clustering points to vertical-specific product gaps: Contacts span recognizable verticals including multifamily residential, franchise fitness, hospitality, automotive, travel, and home services, suggesting that product feedback and feature requests may cluster around vertical-specific workflows such as multi-location reporting, franchise governance, and review management at scale.
